creator: peter@flytrace.com
text:
It seems that to activate the debug one need to rebuild the kernel with the option CONFIG_SND_DEBUG=y (found at https://docs.kernel.org/sound/hd-audio/notes.html). It looks a bit huge task, but I can replace the HDD, install Linux and rebuild the kernel (if it really helps).

Actually I can simply boot into live Linux and do any necessary test.
